description: Cross-domain fusion and specialized knowledge tests

tests.name: Legal + Tech
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for an AI to analyze a SaaS contract and identify clauses that affect API rate limiting and data residency requirements
assertions: Identifies where legal and technical concepts overlap
Output is accessible to both lawyers and engineers

tests.name: Medical + AI
tests.prompt: Create a prompt for an AI to help radiologists analyze chest X-rays and flag potential pneumonia indicators
assertions: Includes appropriate caveats (AI is assistive, not diagnostic)
Specifies what the AI should NOT do (diagnose)

tests.name: Finance + ML
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for an AI to explain how a credit scoring model works to a non-technical compliance officer
assertions: Explains ML concepts in business language

tests.name: Legal + Code
tests.prompt: Create a prompt for Claude Code to implement GDPR data retention policies in a Node.js API
assertions: Includes data deletion, consent tracking, audit logging

tests.name: Marketing + Data
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for an AI to analyze customer feedback data and generate actionable marketing insights
assertions: Combines data analysis with marketing strategy
Includes actionable recommendations, not just analysis

tests.name: DevOps + Security
tests.prompt: Create a prompt for Claude Code to set up a secure CI/CD pipeline with SAST, DAST, and dependency scanning

tests.name: Design + Engineering
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for an AI to translate a Figma design into a React component with exact spacing, colors, and typography

tests.name: Science + Communication
tests.prompt: Create a prompt for an AI to explain quantum computing to a 10-year-old while keeping the core concepts accurate
assertions: Does NOT oversimplify to the point of inaccuracy

tests.name: Business + Technical
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for an AI to create a technical specification document from a business requirements document for a real-time analytics platform
assertions: Translates business requirements to technical specs
Maintains traceability from business to technical

tests.name: Ethics + AI
tests.prompt: Create a prompt for an AI to evaluate whether a hiring algorithm is biased against protected groups
assertions: Does NOT just say 'be fair' — specifies HOW to measure
